title: Trump Discusses AI Guardrails, Nvidia H200 Chip with Xi
summary: During his visit to China, President Trump discussed AI guardrails and Nvidia H200 chip exports with President Xi, noting that China has chosen not to buy the H200 chips. This highlights ongoing geopolitical tensions over advanced AI chips and could impact global AI hardware supply chains and US-China tech decoupling. The US granted export licenses for Nvidia H200 to China, but China has not approved purchases; previously, China also rejected lower-tier H20 chips.
context: The H200 is Nvidia's high-end AI accelerator, and the US has imposed export controls to limit China's access to advanced chips. The Anthropic Mythos model, a frontier AI model, was mentioned as a reason for establishing AI communication channels due to global cybersecurity concerns.

references.title: Anthropic Mythos AI Model Explained: What It Can Do — And Why
